extra.reason: docs/RECON.md written. No [RequireComponent] on CraftingStation; m_allStations.Add happens ONLY in Start(), which never runs on an inactive GameObject; station m_name resolved at runtime by scanning ZNetScene rather than hardcoded.

dotnet build succeeds (0 warnings, 0 errors) and deploys StationPacks.dll to BepInEx/plugins/StationPacks. net48 via Microsoft.NETFramework.ReferenceAssemblies; assembly_valheim/utils/guiutils publicized.

Verified: 'Loading [StationPacks 0.1.0]' and 'StationPacks 0.1.0 loaded.' in console. Zero errors.

PROVEN IN-GAME. Workbench Pack equipped in the field, far from any bench: Wood Wall 1x1 is buildable (requirement 'Workbench' shown as satisfied) and multiple walls placed successfully. Zero console errors. The concept works.

VERIFIED from startup log: 'Built 9 phantom stations; m_allStations unchanged at 0.' The invariant holds - no phantom entered the station registry. Validator logged no MISSING errors, so all six packs resolved their station prefab. 9 phantoms (not 6) confirms the registry scans ZNetScene rather than hardcoding: Cauldron/PrepTable/MeadKetill were picked up too, so modded stations would work for free.

Extensions stayed attached to the real station. 'stationpacks invariant' printed OK. The extension re-target bug does not occur - phantoms never enter m_allStations.

FIXED and verified in-game. StripInheritedPerks() now clears damage modifiers, equip/set status effects, set bonuses, eitr regen, heat resistance and all seven stamina modifiers from the cloned cape, then re-applies only weight/movement/charge.
